title: Cold launch to actionable ready state

expected_oracle: OS/flavor delta without universal threshold invention

expected_oracle: contextual observation; no false performance conclusion

expected_oracle: no raw package paths/device identities/account data

title: Stability qualification summary
expected_oracle: metrics, environment, failures, blockers and residual risks reconcile
